name: theKYB
description: theKYB provides business verification APIs for company data, UBO checks, sanctions and ongoing monitoring, helping compliance teams onboard and review business customers globally.

seo.title: theKYB — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: theKYB: theKYB provides business verification APIs for company data, UBO checks, sanctions and ongoing monitoring, helping compliance teams onboard and review b

when_to_use: Global business verification with UBO discovery via API
Corporate sanctions and adverse media screening for AML
Ongoing business monitoring for regulatory change events
KYB due diligence workflow for B2B fintech onboarding
Multi-country company registry data aggregation API

pros: Company data, UBO and sanctions in one API
Lighter-weight option than Moody's or D&B
cons: Smaller brand, less public track record
Registry coverage depth less documented than Kyckr
review.verdict: Budget KYB option with UBO and monitoring; validate registry coverage against Kyckr before signing.
review.best_for: Fintechs and marketplaces needing affordable global KYB with UBO and ongoing business monitoring
review.not_for: Tier-1 banks whose auditors require named, court-defensible primary registry data sources

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based metered billing scales up and down
